title: Fragment: The Trail
description: Found on the ridge in Scriptura's market district where the Tempo was first sighted. A calling card, worn at the edges, left by something that ran very fast and had time to think at the end.

lines: The ridge was empty. The market noise below had resumed — vendors, footsteps, the ordinary hum of a place that had been briefly interrupted and was already forgetting.

On the ground where the Tempo had first appeared, barely visible against the stone: a card. Small, rectangular, printed on one side with nothing but a mark — something between a footprint and a signature, precise enough to be intentional.
The edges were worn, as if it had been carried for a long time, or as if the Tempo had a habit of touching it while running.

steps.text: The moment the card was picked up, the voice arrived — close, as if spoken from just behind, from someone who had already moved past.

lines.speaker: Tempo
lines.text: I spent a long time running. I assumed the running was the point.

lines.speaker: Tempo
lines.text: The movement, the pursuit. The moment where you almost have something and don't quite.

lines.speaker: Tempo
lines.text: But the best part was when you started running well.

lines.speaker: Tempo
lines.text: When you learned the terrain faster than I expected. When the trail became interesting because you were on the other end of it.

lines.speaker: Tempo
lines.text: I think I was running toward that. The whole time.

steps.text: A brief sound — genuine, quick, the laugh of something that found what it was looking for at exactly the moment it ran out of road.

The card was warm from being carried. The mark on it was faded but clear. Something about holding it made the market feel slightly faster — not urgently so, but with the particular energy of a place that has recently been worth running through.
The sensation of being followed by something that didn't want to catch you.

steps.name: Tempo's Quarry
steps.description: A calling card, worn at the edges. The Tempo's mark. Grants a small SPD bonus. The Tempo of the Mainspring has additional dialogue if this is in inventory. Tooltip: "Good run."
